description: Browser-based tool that extracts design systems from Figma/websites and generates AI-ready DESIGN.md context bundles

userStories.title: Project scaffold and design system foundation
userStories.description: Create the Next.js 15 project with all dependencies, configure TypeScript strict mode, set up the Studio design system CSS tokens in globals.css, and configure Tailwind with custom theme values.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 15 app created with TypeScript strict mode and App Router
All dependencies installed: @anthropic-ai/sdk @monaco-editor/react zustand zod jszip playwright @monaco-editor/react
shadcn/ui initialised with lyra preset

globals.css has all Studio design tokens (--bg-app, --bg-panel, --bg-surface, --bg-elevated, --bg-hover, --border, --border-strong, --accent, --accent-hover, --accent-subtle, --text-primary, --text-secondary, --text-muted, --radius-sm, --radius-md, --radius-lg, --radius-xl, --font, --font-mono, --ease-out, --ease-in-out, --duration-fast, --duration-base, --duration-slow)
tailwind.config.ts extends theme with CSS variable references for all tokens
Geist font loaded (via next/font/google)
npm run typecheck passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: TypeScript types and Zustand stores
userStories.description: Define all shared TypeScript types in lib/types/index.ts and create Zustand stores for project state and extraction state with localStorage persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/types/index.ts defines: Project, ExtractionResult, ExtractedToken, ExtractedComponent, FontDeclaration, AnimationDefinition, ComputedStyleMap, ExportFormat
lib/store/project.ts creates Zustand store with: projects[], currentProjectId, setCurrentProject, updateDesignMd, updateExtractionData actions
lib/store/extraction.ts creates Zustand store with: status, progress, steps[], currentStep, error fields
localStorage persistence implemented via zustand/middleware persist
No TypeScript errors (strict mode)
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Landing page with URL input
userStories.description: Build the landing page at app/page.tsx with the Studio design system, a URL input field that auto-detects Figma vs website URLs, and a row of 6 AI Kit template cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page renders at / with dark theme using Studio design tokens
Tagline: 'Give your AI agent perfect taste.' visible
URL input field accepts Figma URLs (figma.com/file/ or figma.com/design/) and website URLs
When Figma URL detected: shows a PAT input field below the URL field
Extract Design System button is present and enabled when URL is valid
Row of 6 AI Kit cards: Linear, Revolut, Stripe, Notion, Vercel, iOS (with prices)
Verify in browser: page matches the ASCII layout from PRD section 12
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Three-panel Studio layout with resize handles
userStories.description: Build the core three-panel resizable layout at app/studio/[id]/page.tsx using CSS with drag handles between panels.
acceptanceCriteria: app/studio/[id]/page.tsx renders the three-panel layout
Left panel default width 280px, right panel 340px, centre fills remaining space
Drag handle between left and centre panels allows resizing
Drag handle between centre and right panels allows resizing
Minimum panel width enforced at 200px
Layout uses bg-[--bg-app] and the Studio design tokens throughout
Panel heights fill the viewport minus the top bar
Verify in browser: three panels visible with correct proportions
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Top bar component
userStories.description: Build the TopBar component with project name (inline editable), save status indicator, source badge, and action buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: components/shared/TopBar.tsx renders with bg-[--bg-panel] and border-b border-[--border]
Left side: SuperDuper AI Studio logo/wordmark
Centre: project name as inline-editable text (click to edit, blur to save)
Centre: 'Saved Xs ago' or 'Saving...' status indicator
Centre: source badge (Figma icon or Globe icon with source name)
Right side: Re-extract button, Test button (Cmd+T), Export button (Cmd+Shift+E)
Buttons use Studio accent colour styling
Verify in browser: top bar renders correctly at the top of the Studio
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extraction progress UI component
userStories.description: Build the full-screen ExtractionProgress component that displays step-by-step extraction status with a progress bar and estimated time.
acceptanceCriteria: components/studio/ExtractionProgress.tsx renders as a full-screen overlay
Shows extraction source name and type
Progress bar (0-100%) with percentage text
Checklist of extraction steps with status icons (pending/running/complete/failed)
Each step shows granular detail text when running ('Extracting colour styles 12/34...')
Estimated time remaining displayed
Warning notes shown for non-fatal issues (e.g. 'Variables API requires Enterprise plan')
Uses Studio design tokens throughout
Verify in browser: progress UI looks polished and matches PRD ASCII diagram
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Figma API client with rate limiting
userStories.description: Build lib/figma/client.ts - an authenticated fetch wrapper with rate limiting, exponential backoff, and request queuing.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/figma/client.ts exports a FigmaClient class or factory function
Accepts PAT in Authorization: Bearer header
Minimum 100ms delay between API requests (leaky bucket style)
Exponential backoff with jitter on 429 responses (retry up to 3 times)
Accepts an onProgress callback for streaming status updates
All Figma API responses typed with TypeScript interfaces
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Figma styles parser
userStories.description: Build lib/figma/parsers/styles.ts to extract and resolve colour, text, and effect styles from the Figma API.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/figma/parsers/styles.ts exports parseStyles(fileKey, client) function
Calls GET /v1/files/{key}/styles to get style metadata (name, type, node_id)
Batches node IDs into groups of max 50 for GET /v1/files/{key}/nodes?ids=
Parses colour styles: fills[0] RGBA to hex conversion
Parses text styles: fontFamily, fontSize, fontWeight, lineHeight, letterSpacing from TypeStyle
Parses effect styles: shadow/blur with color, offset, radius, spread
Returns normalised ExtractedToken[] array
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Figma components parser
userStories.description: Build lib/figma/parsers/components.ts to extract component inventory from the Figma API.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/figma/parsers/components.ts exports parseComponents(fileKey, client) function
Calls GET /v1/files/{key}/components for component list
Calls GET /v1/files/{key}/component_sets for variant sets
Top 50 components by usage enriched with full node data via GET /v1/files/{key}/nodes?ids=
Parses componentPropertyDefinitions (BOOLEAN/TEXT/VARIANT/INSTANCE_SWAP types)
Variant names extracted from component sets
Returns normalised ExtractedComponent[] array
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Figma extraction orchestrator and API route
userStories.description: Build lib/figma/extractor.ts to orchestrate the full Figma extraction pipeline, and wire it to the POST /api/extract/figma route with SSE progress streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/figma/extractor.ts orchestrates: file metadata → styles → components → layout sampling
Returns complete ExtractionResult
app/api/extract/figma/route.ts accepts POST { figmaUrl, accessToken }
Validates input with Zod (figmaUrl must match figma.com/file/ or figma.com/design/ pattern)
Streams SSE progress events: { type: 'step', step, percent, detail? }
Streams { type: 'complete', data: ExtractionResult } on success
Streams { type: 'error', step, message } on failure
Variables API 403 treated as non-fatal: continues with styles-only
Tested against a real Figma file (or mock) - extraction completes without error
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Website CSS extraction scripts
userStories.description: Build lib/website/css-extract.ts containing all page.evaluate() functions for CSS extraction, font detection, computed styles, animations, breakpoints, and library detection.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/website/css-extract.ts exports self-contained browser-executable functions
extractCSSVariables(): scans :root, [data-theme], html, [class*='dark'] selectors for -- custom properties
extractFonts(): scans @font-face rules for family, src, weight, style, display
extractComputedStyles(): getComputedStyle on h1, h2, h3, p, button (primary/secondary), input, label, a, card
extractAnimations(): scans @keyframes rules
extractBreakpoints(): scans @media rules for pixel breakpoints
detectLibraries(): detects Tailwind, Bootstrap, Material UI, shadcn, Radix, Framer Motion, Lucide, Heroicons, Next.js
All functions are self-contained (no external imports - runs in browser context)
Returns typed data matching ExtractionResult interfaces
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Website Playwright orchestrator and API route
userStories.description: Build lib/website/extractor.ts using Playwright to navigate to a URL, run CSS extraction scripts, capture screenshots, and wire it to POST /api/extract/website.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/website/extractor.ts launches Playwright Chromium (headless: true)
Navigates to URL with waitUntil: 'networkidle'
Runs all page.evaluate() extraction scripts from css-extract.ts
Captures full-page screenshot and viewport screenshot
Screenshots stored as base64 strings in ExtractionResult
Browser closes properly in finally block
app/api/extract/website/route.ts accepts POST { url }
Validates URL with Zod
Streams SSE progress events matching the Figma format
Tested against linear.app - returns Inter font, dark colour values
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Claude DESIGN.md synthesis
userStories.description: Build lib/claude/synthesise.ts and the POST /api/generate/design-md route to generate a structured DESIGN.md from extraction data using Claude Sonnet with streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/claude/synthesise.ts builds the synthesis prompt from ExtractionResult data
Prompt follows the system prompt from PRD Section 14 (extraction synthesis prompt)
User prompt includes: CSS variables, font declarations, computed styles, component inventory, library detection
Uses anthropic.messages.stream with claude-sonnet-4-6 model, max_tokens: 8192
app/api/generate/design-md/route.ts accepts POST { extractionData }
Returns text/plain streaming response with X-Accel-Buffering: no header
Tested: generates a DESIGN.md with all 8 sections populated
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Studio routing and extraction flow
userStories.description: Wire the landing page form submission to start extraction, show the progress UI, then redirect to /studio/[id] once complete. Generate a project ID and save to Zustand + localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the landing page form starts the extraction (POST to appropriate /api/extract/* route)
ExtractionProgress component renders during extraction with live SSE updates
On extraction complete: project is created in Zustand store with ExtractionResult
Claude synthesis is automatically triggered after extraction
DESIGN.md streams into the Zustand store as it generates
Router redirects to /studio/[id] once synthesis begins streaming
Project persists to localStorage
app/studio/[id]/page.tsx loads the correct project from the store
Verify in browser: full flow from URL input to Studio page works
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Monaco editor panel
userStories.description: Build the EditorPanel component with Monaco editor configured for DESIGN.md editing: custom dark theme, markdown mode, word wrap, Geist Mono font, auto-save to Zustand.
acceptanceCriteria: components/studio/EditorPanel.tsx uses dynamic import with ssr: false
Monaco loaded with language: 'markdown', wordWrap: 'on', fontSize: 14, lineHeight: 22
fontFamily: '"Geist Mono", "JetBrains Mono", monospace'
minimap disabled, lineNumbers: 'off', padding: { top: 20, bottom: 80 }
Custom dark theme defined matching Studio palette (--bg-surface as background)
Editor content initialised from Zustand store designMd
Content changes debounced 5 seconds then saved to Zustand store
'Saved' indicator appears and fades after save
Token count estimate displayed: count tokens (chars/4), colour code green/yellow/red
Verify in browser: Monaco loads, is editable, shows DESIGN.md content
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Token autocomplete in Monaco
userStories.description: Register a Monaco CompletionItemProvider for markdown that suggests CSS custom property names from the extracted token set when the user types '--'.
acceptanceCriteria: CompletionItemProvider registered for 'markdown' language
Triggered when cursor is in a code block and user types '--'
Suggestions list all CSS custom property names from extraction data
Each suggestion shows the token value as documentation
Selecting a suggestion inserts the full --variable-name
Verify in browser: typing -- inside a ```css block shows suggestions
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Source panel - Tokens tab
userStories.description: Build the SourcePanel's Tokens tab showing a categorised tree of extracted tokens with colour swatches, values, and clipboard copy on click.
acceptanceCriteria: components/studio/SourcePanel.tsx with three tabs: Tokens | Components | Screenshots
Tokens tab renders categorised sections: Colors, Typography, Spacing, Radius
Color tokens show: round colour swatch, CSS variable name, hex value
Typography tokens show: font name/size/weight details
Spacing/Radius tokens show: name and pixel value
Clicking a token name copies the CSS variable name to clipboard (navigator.clipboard)
Toast or brief visual feedback on copy
Source info section above tabs: source type badge, URL/file name, last extracted time, Re-extract button
Verify in browser: token tree renders with correct colours and values
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Source panel - Components and Screenshots tabs
userStories.description: Build the Components tab (inventory list with variant counts) and Screenshots tab (grid with lightbox) in the SourcePanel.
acceptanceCriteria: Components tab shows list of extracted components with: name, variant count badge, description (if available)
Each component has a 'Go to in DESIGN.md' link that scrolls the editor to the component section
Screenshots tab shows grid of captured screenshots (only for website extractions)
Clicking a screenshot opens a fullscreen lightbox overlay
Lightbox has close button and keyboard Escape to dismiss
Empty state shown when no components or screenshots available
Verify in browser: components list renders, screenshots grid shows for website extractions
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: AI test panel
userStories.description: Build the TestPanel component with context toggle, prompt input, streaming Claude output with syntax highlighting, and quick prompts dropdown.
acceptanceCriteria: components/studio/TestPanel.tsx renders in the right panel
Header shows 'Test Panel' with a context toggle switch labeled 'DESIGN.md context: ON'
When context OFF: header shows 'Bare Claude' with an orange indicator
Prompt textarea with placeholder text and Enter-to-submit (Shift+Enter for newline)
Submit button visible and active when prompt is non-empty
Quick prompts dropdown with prompts auto-generated from component inventory
At minimum includes: 'Build me a primary button', 'Build me a card component', 'Build me a form input'
Output area renders streaming text with syntax-highlighted code blocks
Thumbs up / thumbs down / Re-run buttons below each response
[Copy] button on each code block
Verify in browser: typing a prompt and submitting returns a streaming response
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Test API route with Claude streaming
userStories.description: Build the POST /api/generate/test route that calls Claude with optional DESIGN.md context and streams the response.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/generate/test/route.ts accepts POST { prompt, designMd, includeContext, model? }
When includeContext true: system prompt is the test panel system prompt from PRD Section 14 + full designMd content
When includeContext false: system prompt is the 'Bare Claude' version
Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 model by default
Streams response as text/plain with X-Accel-Buffering: no header
TestPanel reads the stream and appends tokens to output in real-time
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Basic context health score
userStories.description: After each test response, calculate and display a simple 0-100 health score based on regex checks of the generated code.
acceptanceCriteria: After test response completes, health score is calculated client-side
Checks performed on the output text:
- No hardcoded hex values (#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}): -20 per occurrence, max -40
- Uses CSS variables (var(--): +20 if found
- Uses correct font family from extraction: +20 if font name found in output
- No inline style with hardcoded colours: +10
- Score normalised to 0-100
Health score displayed below output with label: 'Context Health: X/100'
Individual check results shown as green ticks or orange warnings
Violations listed with specific examples from the generated code
Verify in browser: submitting a test prompt shows the health score panel
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Export: CLAUDE.md and Cursor rules generators
userStories.description: Build lib/export/claude-md.ts and lib/export/cursor-rules.ts to generate CLAUDE.md section and .cursor/rules/*.mdc files from project data.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/export/claude-md.ts exports generateClaudeMd(project) function
Generated CLAUDE.md section follows the format from PRD Section 7.5 exactly
Includes: ## Design System heading, critical rules (from Quick Reference section), file reference paths
lib/export/cursor-rules.ts exports generateCursorRules(project) function
Returns { designSystem: string, components: string } - two .mdc file contents
design-system.mdc has alwaysApply: true frontmatter
components.mdc has globs: ['**/*.tsx', '**/*.jsx'] frontmatter
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Export: token format generators
userStories.description: Build lib/export/tokens-css.ts, lib/export/tokens-json.ts, and lib/export/tailwind-config.ts to generate the three token export formats.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/export/tokens-css.ts exports generateTokensCss(tokens) function
Generates valid CSS :root block with all tokens as custom properties
lib/export/tokens-json.ts exports generateTokensJson(tokens) function
Generates W3C DTCG compliant JSON with $type, $value, $description fields
lib/export/tailwind-config.ts exports generateTailwindConfig(tokens) function
Generates valid tailwind.config.js with theme.extend mapping CSS vars to Tailwind keys
All generators return string (file contents)
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Export modal and ZIP bundle download
userStories.description: Build the ExportModal component with format checkboxes and the POST /api/export/bundle route that generates and returns a ZIP file.
acceptanceCriteria: components/studio/ExportModal.tsx opens when Export button clicked (or Cmd+Shift+E)
Shows checkboxes for: CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules, tokens.css, tokens.json, tailwind.config.js
All checkboxes selected by default
Preview pane shows content of first selected format
Download Bundle button triggers POST to /api/export/bundle
app/api/export/bundle/route.ts generates each selected format using lib/export/ functions
Bundles all into ZIP using JSZip
Returns ZIP as application/zip download response
File downloads in browser with name [project-name]-ai-kit.zip
Verify in browser: export modal opens, selecting formats and clicking download delivers a ZIP
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Section navigator in Monaco
userStories.description: Add a section navigator to the EditorPanel that detects ## headings in the DESIGN.md and renders clickable navigation markers.
acceptanceCriteria: EditorPanel detects ## heading patterns in the document on content change
Detected headings shown as a small navigation list below or beside the editor
Alternatively: rendered as an overlay/sidebar navigator with clickable labels
Clicking a heading scrolls the Monaco editor to that line
Updates in real-time as content changes
Verify in browser: section nav shows DESIGN.md headings, clicking scrolls editor
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Keyboard shortcuts
userStories.description: Implement the global keyboard shortcuts specified in the PRD: Cmd+S (save), Cmd+T (focus test panel), Cmd+Shift+E (open export modal), Cmd+1/2/3 (focus panels).
acceptanceCriteria: useKeyboardShortcuts hook or global event listener in StudioLayout
Cmd+S: triggers save of DESIGN.md to store
Cmd+T: focuses the test panel prompt textarea
Cmd+Shift+E: opens the export modal
Cmd+1: focuses/scrolls to source panel
Cmd+2: focuses Monaco editor
Cmd+3: focuses test panel
Cmd+B: toggles left panel visibility
Shortcuts work on Mac (Cmd) - Windows/Linux use Ctrl equivalents
Verify in browser: keyboard shortcuts function correctly
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Error states and empty states
userStories.description: Implement proper error handling and empty states throughout the app: extraction failures, invalid PAT, rate limit errors, and the no-project Studio state.
acceptanceCriteria: Figma extraction: invalid/expired PAT shows clear error with link to figma.com/settings/tokens
Figma extraction: file not accessible shows error about shared link permissions
Figma extraction: Variables API 403 shows non-fatal warning, continues with styles
Website extraction: network timeout shows error with retry option
All extraction errors shown in the ExtractionProgress UI
Studio with no project (direct /studio/new URL): shows empty state with URL input
Test panel empty state: prompt area has helpful placeholder text
Source panel empty state when no extraction data: placeholder with instructions
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Polish and visual verification
userStories.description: Final visual pass to ensure the Studio exactly matches the PRD design spec. Fix any spacing, colour, or layout issues. Verify the full end-to-end flow works.
acceptanceCriteria: All backgrounds use correct Studio design tokens (no hardcoded colours in components)
All interactive elements have :hover and :focus states using transition --duration-base
All borders use border-[--border] or border-[--border-strong] not arbitrary values
All text uses --text-primary, --text-secondary, or --text-muted
Fonts render correctly (Geist for UI, Geist Mono for code/editor)
Full end-to-end flow tested: landing → extract (Figma or website) → Studio → test → export
No console errors in browser devtools
npm run build completes without errors
npm run typecheck passes
npm run lint passes
